# Apache Hamilton

> Apache Hamilton is a lightweight Python framework for creating DAGs of data transformations using declarative function definitions.

## Docs

- [<no title>](https://hamilton.apache.org/_sources/index.md.txt)
- [Get Started](https://hamilton.apache.org/_sources/get-started/index.rst.txt)
